services.title: What we do
services.description1: Our service model combines product design, engineering, and growth strategy in one streamlined pipeline.
services.description2: Instead of fragmented vendors, you get one team responsible for architecture, conversion-focused UX, speed, and long-term visibility.
values: High-performance build quality and clean code
SEO and marketing readiness from the first sprint

items.title: Cloud Strategy
items.description: Scalable architectures built for 99.9% uptime and global reach.

items.title: Custom Software
items.description: Bespoke applications designed around your unique business workflows.

items.title: Security Audits
items.description: Proactive threat mitigation and rigorous system stress testing.

items.title: Performance Opt
items.description: Identifying bottlenecks and refining systems for maximum speed.

items.title: SEO & Growth
items.description: Technical SEO setup, content architecture, and measurable search visibility growth.

workflow.title: Fast single-page websites without chaos.
workflow.subtitle: A structured process that keeps speed high, feedback clear, and your business goals in focus.
benefits: Design + SEO + marketing alignment from day one

steps.title: Rapid discovery
steps.description: We gather only essential inputs first: business goal, offer, audience, references, tone, and desired emotional impact.
steps.benefit: You avoid long questionnaires and get momentum immediately.

steps.title: Traffic and promotion planning
steps.description: We align expected traffic, SEO scope, promotion conditions, and budget. We also map SMM channels if needed.
steps.benefit: Your site is designed for real growth, not just visuals.

steps.title: Prototype and approval loop
steps.description: We build a fast concept in Stitch, present it, and iterate in short loops until direction is approved.
steps.benefit: You see results early and steer decisions with confidence.

steps.title: Content and assets integration
steps.description: After first layout approval, we collect photos, documents, and resources, then refine the design with real content.
steps.benefit: The final site looks polished and accurate to your brand.

steps.title: Build, review, and release
steps.description: We choose the right stack, develop from the approved visuals, present the working site, and finalize practical edits.
steps.benefit: Predictable delivery, clear scope, and smooth launch preparation.

steps.title: Domain, SEO, and marketing handoff
steps.description: Once visuals are finalized, we proceed with domain setup and complete SEO + marketing execution as the final stage.
steps.benefit: You launch with a ready-to-promote digital product.

about.title: About Our Company
about.description1: EvolaTech is not just an IT agency; we are digital architects. We believe that software should be as enduring and precise as classical architecture.
about.description2: Our values are rooted in transparency, technical excellence, and minimalist design. We work with select partners who seek to push the boundaries of what's possible in the digital realm.

contact.title: Let's build
contact.description: Ready to start your next project? Get in touch for a consultation with our senior architects.

footer.description: We design and build high-performing digital products with clear strategy, clean execution, and long-term support.
